content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be tracking well through the left curve continuing on course.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 45 + 5 = 50
Waypoint 50: (5.1807, 2.7654)
Car position: (6.0684, 2.6555)
Bearing = atan2(2.7654 - 2.6555, 5.1807 - 6.0684) = atan2(0.1099, -0.8877)
= 180 - atan2(0.1099, 0.8877) = 180 - 7.06° = 172.94°
Current heading: 158.94°
Delta = 172.94 - 158.94 = 14.0° → left (positive)
